world.title: Giro d’Italia Stage 8 Preview
world.description: A fun stage awaits with a series of sharp climbs in the finish. This is what a Giro stage should look like, exploiting the land, scenery and architecture. Stage 7 Review: the stage win for Jonas Vingegaard and in the predicted manner: attacking with 5km to go…

climate.title: Punjab’s paddy dilemma: Can it save groundwater and preserve soil health at the same time?
climate.description: In response to the worsening groundwater crisis, the Punjab government has aggressively promoted direct-seeded rice (DSR) for the past decade or so. But can the state stave off that crisis at the cost of increasing chemical dependence?
